message:
fix(runtime): refactor PSYNC decision flow to separate offset resolution from response generation, and apply rustfmt to CONFIG SET error blocks

PSYNC: The previous PSYNC handler interleaved the continue/fullresync decision
with the response frame construction, making it impossible to use the resolved
offset in the replica state update without duplicating the match. Now separates
into two phases: (1) resolve continued_offset: Option<ReplOffset> from the
PsyncDecision, (2) build response frame from the Option. The replica offset
update then reads from continued_offset directly instead of re-parsing the
raw request.

Also applies rustfmt to 3 CONFIG SET error blocks (maxmemory, slowlog-max-len,
hz) where RespFrame::Error(format!(...)) was wrapped in unnecessary
parentheses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
